evals.prompt: Generate an image of a futuristic city at night with neon lights reflecting on wet streets
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created and the file path is reported to the user. The revised prompt (if any) is also shown.

evals.prompt: Create a wide landscape painting of a peaceful Japanese garden in autumn with maple trees
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file in 1792x1024 landscape format is created. The skill detects 'wide landscape' and uses --size 1792x1024.

evals.prompt: Make me a detailed HD portrait of an astronaut on Mars, photorealistic style
evals.expected_output: A PNG image in portrait format (1024x1792) with --quality hd and --style natural, since the user said 'photorealistic'.

evals.prompt: Generate a new image inspired by this photo but with a cyberpunk aesthetic: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/47/PNG_transparency_demonstration_1.png/240px-PNG_transparency_demonstration_1.png
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using --reference-image with the provided URI. The script uses gpt-image-1 via /v1/responses. The file path is reported to the user.

evals.prompt: Take this image https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/47/PNG_transparency_demonstration_1.png/240px-PNG_transparency_demonstration_1.png and reimagine it as a watercolor painting
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using --reference-image with the provided URI and a prompt describing the watercolor style transformation.
